canonical_question: How do I build a messaging framework — positioning statement, value propositions, proof points, differentiators?
aliases: How to write a positioning statement and value propositions
Messaging hierarchy — brand promise to proof points
constraints: Positioning must be based on validated customer research — minimum 10 customer interviews before finalizing
Each value proposition requires at least 2 proof points with verifiable data or named customer references
Framework must be tested with target audience before adoption — minimum 9 respondents for qualitative validation
Messaging must differentiate from top 3-5 competitors — claims that apply equally to competitors are not differentiators
Review and update framework quarterly or whenever competitive landscape, product, or ICP changes significantly

skip_this_unit_if.condition: User needs brand identity (logo, colors, visual system) rather than verbal messaging
User needs a go-to-market strategy, not just messaging
User needs to test existing messaging rather than build new

inputs_needed.question: What stage is the business at?
How much customer research is available?

depends_on.label: ICP definition required before messaging can target correctly
Competitive analysis to identify true differentiators

related_to.label: GTM strategy that uses messaging framework for channel-specific copy
